name: Colossus Segment Features
description: Random features and attacks based on segment types.

results.name: Crushing Blow (Torso/Arm)
results.description: Crushing Blow: Deals massive physical damage to adjacent targets.

results.name: Tail Swipe (Tail)
results.description: Tail Swipe: Hits all targets in a wide arc behind the Colossus.

results.name: Piercing Gaze (Head)
results.description: Piercing Gaze: Deals magical damage and imposes Stress on a target within Far range.

results.name: Acid Spray (Head/Abdomen)
results.description: Acid Spray: Sprays a cone of acid dealing persistent damage over time.

results.name: Trample (Leg)
results.description: Trample: Moves through enemy spaces, dealing damage and knocking them prone.

results.name: Defensive Spikes (Carapace/Shell)
results.description: Defensive Spikes: Deals damage to anyone making a successful melee attack against this segment.

results.name: Thunderous Roar (Head)
results.description: Thunderous Roar: Stuns all targets within Close range for 1 round.

results.name: Grabbing Claw (Claw/Pincer/Arm)
results.description: Grabbing Claw: Grapples a target and prevents them from moving away.

results.name: Web Shot (Abdomen/Head)
results.description: Web Shot: Fires a sticky web that restrains targets in a circular area.

results.name: Fire Breath (Head)
results.description: Fire Breath: Exhales a massive line of fire dealing physical damage.

results.name: Whirlwind Attack (Torso/Thorax)
results.description: Whirlwind Attack: Spins rapidly, hitting all targets within Melee range.

results.name: Wing Buffet (Wing)
results.description: Wing Buffet: Creates a powerful gust of wind that pushes targets back and knocks them prone.

results.name: Poison Sting (Tail)
results.description: Poison Sting: Deals physical damage and inflicts a powerful poison.

results.name: Magnetic Pulse (Mechanical/Thorax)
results.description: Magnetic Pulse: Disables all metallic equipment and constructs within Close range.

results.name: Vent Steam (Mechanical/Thorax/Abdomen)
results.description: Vent Steam: Releases a cloud of hot steam dealing minor damage and obscuring vision.

results.name: Pressurized Jet (Head/Abdomen)
results.description: Pressurized Jet: Blasts a high-pressure stream of water that knocks targets back.

results.name: Magma Spit (Head)
results.description: Magma Spit: Launches a glob of molten rock that leaves a burning pool.

results.name: Sandstorm (Thorax/Torso)
results.description: Sandstorm: Creates a localized desert storm that blinds and scrapes enemies.

results.name: Lightning Strike (Head/Wing)
results.description: Lightning Strike: Calls down a bolt of electricity on a target within Far range.

results.name: Shadow Tendril (Abdomen/Tail/Claw)
results.description: Shadow Tendril: Reaches out with ethereal limbs to drain life force.

results.name: Bone Shards (Torso/Carapace)
results.description: Bone Shards: Explodes out jagged bone fragments in all directions when hit.

results.name: Clockwork Barrage (Torso/Arm)
results.description: Clockwork Barrage: Fires a volley of metallic bolts at multiple targets.

results.name: Frost Breath (Head)
results.description: Frost Breath: Exhales a freezing mist that slows all targets in a cone.

results.name: Earthquake Slam (Leg)
results.description: Earthquake Slam: Stomps the ground, causing a shockwave that knocks everyone nearby prone.

results.name: Spectral Howl (Head)
results.description: Spectral Howl: A bone-chilling scream that imposes Fear on all who hear it.

results.name: Aura of Dread (Torso/Carapace)
results.description: Aura of Dread: Adjacent enemies suffer Disadvantage on Courage checks.

results.name: Static Discharge (Leg/Wing)
results.description: Static Discharge: When an enemy hits this segment, they take lightning damage.

results.name: Chilling Aura (Carapace/Torso)
results.description: Chilling Aura: Enemies starting their turn adjacent to this segment have their movement halved.

results.name: Molten Coating (Carapace/Shell)
results.description: Molten Coating: Attempting to touch or climb this segment deals fire damage and imposes stress.

results.name: Ethereal Shift (Abdomen/Wing)
results.description: Ethereal Shift: Briefly becomes incorporeal to phase through solid objects or avoid an attack.

results.name: Hovering Presence (Wing/Leg)
results.description: Hovering Presence: The Colossus can remain stationary in the air without needing to move.

results.name: Soul Siphon (Head/Claw)
results.description: Soul Siphon: Drains health from a recently fallen creature to restore its own.

results.name: Heat Vent (Thorax/Torso)
results.description: Heat Vent: Releases a burst of intense heat that pushes back adjacent enemies.

results.name: Magnetic Shield (Carapace/Torso)
results.description: Magnetic Shield: Gains resistance to physical projectiles (arrows, bolts).

results.name: Acidic Slime (Abdomen/Leg)
results.description: Acidic Slime: Leaves a trail that deals acid damage and makes the ground difficult terrain.

results.name: Ink Cloud (Abdomen/Tail)
results.description: Ink Cloud: Creates a heavily obscured area in a Far radius.

results.name: Regenerative Core (Torso/Thorax)
results.description: Regenerative Core: Restores 1 HP at the start of its turn if this segment is intact.

results.name: Sonar Ping (Head/Antennae)
results.description: Sonar Ping: Detects all hidden creatures within Very Far range.

results.name: Overdrive (Thorax/Leg)
results.description: Overdrive: Briefly doubles movement speed but takes minor damage after.

results.name: Necrotic Pulse (Torso/Head)
results.description: Necrotic Pulse: Deals magic damage and prevents healing for 1 round.

results.name: Hydraulic Stomp (Leg)
results.description: Hydraulic Stomp: Powerful stomp that also knocks back nearby enemies.

results.name: Bio-Luminescent Pulse (Head/Abdomen)
results.description: Bio-Luminescent Pulse: Blinds all enemies in Close range for 1 round.

results.name: Gale Wings (Wing)
results.description: Gale Wings: Activating this allows moving an enemy within Close range to Very Close range.

results.name: Earthen Armor (Carapace/Shell)
results.description: Earthen Armor: Gains resistance to physical damage from non-magical sources.

results.name: Void Echo (Head/Antennae)
results.description: Void Echo: Forces an enemy to re-roll their last successful check.

results.name: Corrosive Maw (Head)
results.description: Corrosive Maw: Bite attacks also reduce target's AC by 1 for the rest of combat.

results.name: Whiplash Tail (Tail)
results.description: Whiplash Tail: A snap of the tail that can disarm a target.

results.name: Pressure Blast (Head/Arm)
results.description: Pressure Blast: Concentrated water blast that deals massive blunt damage.

results.name: Seismic Kick (Leg)
results.description: Seismic Kick: A kick that also creates a small tremor, knocking adjacent enemies back.

results.name: Arcing Limb (Arm/Tentacle)
results.description: Arcing Limb: Melee attacks with this limb chain to one additional nearby enemy.

results.name: Soul Rend (Claw/Arm)
results.description: Soul Rend: Claws that cut through to the spirit, dealing magic damage.

results.name: Toxic Skin (Carapace/Abdomen)
results.description: Toxic Skin: Contact with this segment inflicts Poison damage.

results.name: Geothermal Vent (Thorax/Torso)
results.description: Geothermal Vent: Erupts with boiling water or steam when this segment is damaged.

results.name: Feather Buffet (Wing)
results.description: Feather Buffet: Shoots sharp, magical feathers in a wide cone.

results.name: Static Field (Carapace/Thorax)
results.description: Static Field: Ranged attacks made from within Close range suffer a penalty.

results.name: Grave Chill (Head/Tail)
results.description: Grave Chill: Fearful aura that also reduces AC of affected targets.

results.name: Internal Reactor (Torso/Thorax)
results.description: Internal Reactor: Gains temporary HP whenever it deals fire or mechanical damage.

results.name: Blighted Touch (Arm/Tentacle)
results.description: Blighted Touch: Deals necrotic damage and weakens the physical defenses of targets.

results.name: Hydro-Hammer (Arm/Leg)
results.description: Hydro-Hammer: A blow with the force of an ocean wave.

results.name: Thunderous Stomp (Leg)
results.description: Thunderous Stomp: Stomp that also deals sonic damage in a Close radius.

results.name: Abyssal Grip (Arm/Claw)
results.description: Abyssal Grip: Drains stress when grappling an opponent.

results.name: Frost Volley (Thorax/Arm)
results.description: Frost Volley: Shoots shards of ice at multiple targets.

results.name: Scorching Swat (Arm/Tail)
results.description: Scorching Swat: A strike that also deals lingering fire damage.

results.name: Obsidian Shards (Carapace/Shell)
results.description: Obsidian Shards: Gains additional AC but becomes vulnerable to bludgeoning damage.

results.name: Warping Gaze (Head)
results.description: Warping Gaze: Confuses an enemy, making them move in a random direction.

results.name: Mechanical Repair (Torso/Thorax)
results.description: Mechanical Repair: Can use an action to restore HP to an adjacent segment.

results.name: Screeching Echo (Head)
results.description: Screeching Echo: Dissonant shriek that deals magic damage and prevents spellcasting.

results.name: Ethereal Grasp (Claw/Arm)
results.description: Ethereal Grasp: Can grapple incorporeal creatures.

results.name: Celerity (Leg/Wing)
results.description: Celerity: Does not trigger opportunity attacks when moving.

results.name: Seismic Roar (Head/Thorax)
results.description: Seismic Roar: Deals sonic damage and creates difficult terrain in a Close radius.

results.name: Void Barrier (Carapace/Shell)
results.description: Void Barrier: Gains resistance to magical damage.

results.name: Mechanical Grip (Arm/Claw)
results.description: Mechanical Grip: Grappled targets cannot attempt to escape using Dexterity.

results.name: Infernal Heat (Thorax/Abdomen)
results.description: Infernal Heat: Adjacent enemies take fire damage at the start of their turn.

results.name: Spectral Shift (Abdomen/Tail)
results.description: Spectral Shift: Can swap places with an adjacent creature as a reaction.

results.name: Bio-Organic Repair (Torso/Thorax)
results.description: Bio-Organic Repair: Slowly regenerates over time, healing all segments for 1 HP every hour.
